name: Ava Mae Thompson
reasoning: Dry, sometimes flaky and sensitive skin; prefers strengthening the skin barrier rather than drying acne actives or adding extra steps. Ingredients like ceramides/glycerin/hyaluronic plus an occlusive fit her nightly routine and help reduce redness after outdoor shifts. Also values practicality: drugstore price, pump packaging, fragrance-free/sensitive labeling, travel/sample sizes, and a daytime option with SPF to increase useability.
improvement: Offer a lightweight daytime version (or paired daytime formula) with a non-greasy finish and SPF 30 so it can be used under makeup and replace an extra product.

name: Camila Ramirez

name: Harper Elise Monroe
occupation: Retail Sales Associate (Beauty & Skincare) / Part-time Content Creator
reasoning: Fits her oily, acne-prone skin and many customers; clinically proven actives address breakouts (immediate pain point); prioritizes efficacy with low risk of irritation; also easy to demo and recommend as a seller/content creator.

name: Hana Park
